prompt: Aerial cinematic photograph of a terraced Mediterranean hillside town at golden hour. The town is built on a hillside that slopes clearly and dramatically downward from the inland outskirts toward the sea on the right side of the frame. However, each individual terrace and street within the town visibly slopes upward toward the town centre — the terraced streets climb steeply inward. The overall landscape descends toward the sea while every individual street within it ascends in the opposite direction. The contradiction between the overall slope and the individual street slopes is clearly visible from this aerial perspective. Warm amber golden hour light raking across the terraces, casting long shadows that reveal both slope directions simultaneously. Photorealistic aerial photography, shot from a drone at a 45-degree angle. Stone buildings, terracotta roofs, narrow winding streets. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no annotations, no arrows, no mathematical notation, no floating elements, no data visualisations. Everything in the scene is a real physical object that exists in the world.
metaphor: Every individual street slopes upward toward the centre, yet the overall landscape descends to the sea — a trend that reverses with aggregation.
